summary: Chatbot Parcel Search Feature Test (Iteration 11) - All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend fully functional with parcel_results rendering, parcel cards with cadastral refs, fly-to on click, and updated quick actions.
passed_tests: === CHATBOT PARCEL SEARCH (6/6) ===
POST /api/chat with 'Trouve des parcelles 30MW PACA 2ha minimum' returns type=parcel_results
Each parcel has required fields: parcel_id, ref_cadastrale, commune, latitude, longitude, surface_ha, dist_poste_htb_m, tension_htb_kv, plu_zone, dvf_prix_median_m2, score, site_origin
Parcels sorted by score descending
Response includes sites_searched array with substation info (name, lat, lng, grid)
Response includes fly_to coordinates for map centering
Parcels have real cadastral references (e.g., 130390000B0190 in Fos-sur-Mer)
=== MACRO SEARCH STILL WORKS (1/1) ===
POST /api/chat with 'Sites en PACA' returns type=search_results
=== SUMMARY STILL WORKS (1/1) ===
POST /api/chat with 'Résumé S3REnR' returns type=summary
=== PARCEL SEARCH VARIATIONS (2/2) ===
Parcel search with HdF region works
Parcel search with 'Terrains 2ha+ près de Fos' works
=== DATA QUALITY (3/3) ===
Parcels respect minimum surface filter (2ha minimum)
Parcels have HTB distance calculated (dist_poste_htb_m > 0)
Parcels include future 400kV line data (dist_future_400kv_m, future_400kv_score_bonus)
=== ENDPOINT BASICS (2/2) ===
POST /api/chat endpoint exists and returns 200
Chat endpoint returns valid JSON with 'type' field
=== FRONTEND DESKTOP ===
Dashboard loads with COCKPIT IMMO header
Chatbot open button visible (data-testid='chatbot-open-btn')
Chatbot panel opens with updated quick actions
Quick actions: 'Trouve des parcelles 30MW PACA', 'Terrains 2ha+ près de Fos', 'Parcelles zone industrielle HdF', 'Résumé S3REnR'
Chat input and send button work correctly
Parcel search returns parcel_results with 3 parcel cards
Parcel cards show: ref_cadastrale, surface (ha), score, commune, HTB distance, PLU zone, 400kV info
Clicking parcel card flies map to parcel location
Clicking parcel card selects parcel in sidebar (shows ParcelDetail)
ParcelDetail shows Future 400kV section with distance, zone, bonus scoring
=== PREVIOUS FEATURES VERIFIED ===
GET /api/map/rte-future-400kv returns line + buffers (future 400kV still works)
GET /api/dvf/commune/13039 returns DVF data (DVF still works)
POST /api/export/pdf returns valid PDF (PDF export still works)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - uses real IGN Carto API for cadastral parcels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chatbot parcel search feature fully tested. Key endpoints: 1) POST /api/chat with parcel search query (e.g., 'Trouve des parcelles 30MW PACA 2ha minimum') returns type=parcel_results with real cadastral parcels from IGN API. 2) Each parcel has: parcel_id, ref_cadastrale, commune, latitude, longitude, surface_ha, dist_poste_htb_m, tension_htb_kv, plu_zone, dvf_prix_median_m2, score, site_origin, dist_future_400kv_m, future_400kv_buffer, future_400kv_score_bonus. 3) Response includes sites_searched array and fly_to coordinates. Frontend: ChatBot.js renders parcel_results with clickable parcel cards. Clicking a card calls onSelectParcelFromChat which sets selectedParcel in Dashboard.js and flies map to parcel location. Quick actions updated to parcel-focused queries. Response time for parcel search is 5-15 seconds due to IGN API calls.

chat_parcel_search.returns: type=parcel_results with parcels array, sites_searched, fly_to

frontend_components.ChatBot.js: Renders parcel_results with clickable parcel cards (data-testid='chat-parcel-{i}')
frontend_components.Dashboard.js: onSelectParcelFromChat prop passed to ChatBot, calls setSelectedParcel

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - uses real IGN Carto API for cadastral parcels and Emergent LLM key for NLP parsing
